def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    sorted_abs = nums.map { |x| x.abs }.sort
    n = sorted_abs.size
    total = 0
    for i in 0..n-2
        x = sorted_abs[i]
        target = 2 * x
        low = i + 1
        high = n - 1
        res = i
        while low <= high
            mid = (low + high) / 2
            if sorted_abs[mid] <= target
                res = mid
                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end
        end
        total += (res - i)
    end
    return total
end

function solve(nums) {
    const abs_nums = nums.map(x => Math.abs(x));
    abs_nums.sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const n = abs_nums.length;

        let high = arr.length - 1;
        while (low <= high) {
            let mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
            if (arr[mid] < target) {
                low = mid + 1;
            } else {
                high = mid - 1;
            }
        }
        return low;
    }

    function findLastLessOrEqual(arr, target, start) {
        let low = start;
        let high = arr.length - 1;
        while (low <= high) {
            let mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
            if (arr[mid] > target) {
                high = mid - 1;
            } else {
                low = mid + 1;
            }
        }
        return high;
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
        const x = abs_nums[i];
        const lower = x / 2;
        const upper = 2 * x;
        const start = i + 1;
        const left = findFirstGreaterOrEqual(abs_nums, lower, start);
        const right = findLastLessOrEqual(abs_nums, upper, start);
        if (left <= right) {
            total += (right - left + 1);
        }
    }

    return total;
}

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  sorted_abs = nums.map { |x| x.abs }.sort
  n = sorted_abs.length
  total = 0

  def find_first_ge(arr, target, start)
    low = start
    high = arr.length - 1
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if arr[mid] < target
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    low
  end

    low = start

    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if arr[mid] > target
        high = mid - 1
      else
        low = mid + 1
      end
    end
    high
  end

    right = find_last_le(sorted_abs, target_high, i + 1)
    if left <= right
      total += (right - left + 1)
    end
  end

function solve(nums) {
    const abs_nums = nums.map(x => Math.abs(x));
    abs_nums.sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const n = abs_nums.length;
    let total = 0;

    function findFirstGreaterOrEqual(arr, target, start) {
        let low = start;
        let high = arr.length - 1;
        while (low <= high) {
            let mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
            if (arr[mid] < target) {
                low = mid + 1;
            } else {
                high = mid - 1;
            }
        }
        return low;
    }

    function findLastLessOrEqual(arr, target, start) {
        let low = start;
        let high = arr.length - 1;
        while (low <= high) {
            let mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
            if (arr[mid] > target) {
                high = mid - 1;
            } else {
                low = mid + 1;
            }
        }
        return high;
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
        const x = abs_nums[i];
        const lower = x / 2;
        const upper = 2 * x;
        const start = i + 1;
        const left = findFirstGreaterOrEqual(abs_nums, lower, start);
        const right = findLastLessOrEqual(abs_nums, upper, start);
        if (left <= right) {
            total += (right - left + 1);
        }
    }

    return total;
}
